name: Stellar V Capital Corp. (Cayman Islands)
summary: PART I In this Annual Report on Form 10-K (the Form 10-K), references to the Company and to we, us, and our refer to Stellar V Capital Corp. Introduction We are a blank check company incorporated on July 12, 2024 as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses.
